creator: kanou@mil.allnet.ne.jp
text:
PfaEdit port updated by maintainer. Unfetchable files are fixed.

How-To-Repeat: 
1. Remove two obsolete patches files/patch-aa and files/patch-ab .
2. Expand this shell archive at /usr/ports/print/pfaedit and overwrite 
   existing port. 
(pkg-plist and pkg-comment are not included because they are not modified)
